description.gm:
Ethillion is also one of the components required to create a runeforged weapon in the Runeforge pool (see Part Ten: Weapons of Power).

The secret of creating ethillion died with the Abjurant Lords. Uncharged ethillion drains magic from an item placed in it over 24 hours, rendering it nonmagical and creating 1 dose of ethillion per 5,000 gp of the drained item's value.
description.value:
Ethillion is a shimmering, pale blue liquid invented by the Abjurant Lords of Runeforge — a rare abjuration-infused alchemical substance that stores magical potentiality. It can be safely transported in any container that can hold water.

Activate A (manipulate)

You drink the ethillion, becoming infused with magical potentiality. You gain a +2 item bonus to your next Crafting check made to Craft a magic item. In addition, the time required to Craft the item is reduced by 1 day (to a minimum of 1 day). Multiple doses of ethillion stack; the effects persist until you next attempt to Craft a magic item.

Activate F (manipulate)

You use a flask of ethillion as an additional material component while Casting an abjuration spell. The spell's counteract modifier (if any) increases by 2, and creatures that must attempt a saving throw against the spell take a -1 circumstance penalty to that save.
A flask of shimmering, pale blue liquid that hums faintly with arcane energy.
